name: RTX 2080
description: High-performance graphics card designed for modern gaming and creative workloads. Built with advanced GPU architecture to deliver smooth frame rates, ray tracing capabilities, and AI-powered enhancements for rendering and video processing.

name: Ryzen 7 9700X
description: Powerful multi-core processor optimized for gaming, productivity, and content creation. Delivers exceptional performance for multitasking, compiling code, video editing, and demanding applications.

name: ASUS Z590 TUF Gaming
description: Feature-rich motherboard with advanced power delivery, PCIe expansion slots, and high-speed connectivity. Built for stability and performance for gamers, developers, and PC enthusiasts.

name: T-Force Delta DDR5 2x16
description: High-speed DDR5 memory designed for gaming rigs and workstations. Includes customizable RGB lighting and optimized latency for smooth system performance.

name: FireCuda 520 SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast NVMe SSD offering lightning-fast read and write speeds. Ideal for operating systems, game libraries, and heavy workloads requiring rapid storage performance.

name: Gigabyt GM550 Gold
description: Efficient modular power supply with high wattage capacity and stable voltage output. Designed for modern gaming systems with multiple GPUs and high-end CPUs.

name: Arctic B650M AIO
description: All-in-one liquid cooling solution that keeps high-performance CPUs running at optimal temperatures. Features quiet fans and sleek design for modern PC builds.

name: Lian Li C55I Mid Tower Case
description: Premium mid-tower PC case with tempered glass panels and excellent airflow. Designed for cable management, modular components, and stylish gaming setups.

name: Logitect G703 Mechanical Keyboard
description: Mechanical keyboard designed for gaming precision and fast response times. Includes programmable keys, RGB lighting, and durable switches for long-term use.
